logistics.format: Audit Examination (proctored, multiple-choice). ISO 22301, NFPA 1600, and CSA Z1600-17 variants available.

formal: Complete prerequisite course: Business Continuity Planning for Auditors
Provide 2+ professional references for each of 7 subject-matter areas

recommended_certs.rationale: ISO 22301 LA とのダブルホールドで継続性領域の監査人として強い肩書きを持つ。
CBCA (BCM Auditor) を経て、Lead Auditor の CBCLA に進むのが DRI 公式のラダー。

minus.note: BCM/audit niche; recognition outside continuity profession is limited.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
